NAVAREA XIX 83/26



1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  210630 UTC JUN 26

NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.



72-32.50N 020-21.50E TRANCOCEAN ENABLER

66-00.10N 007-47.90E SCARABEO 8

65-41.90N 007-39.10E FLOATEL ENDURANCE

65-08.00N 006-42.30E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

65-18.70N 007-15.70E ISLAND INNOVATOR



NOTES:

A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　78/26
